reviews.review_title: PLEASE FIX, I WANNA PLAY SO BAD
reviews.review_description:
I’m a content creator with 240,000+ subscribers by the name of Samgaming01, and recently tried to play and record this game with a couple OG formers I used to make videos with. However im sure you get this a lot, but the join system was wack. Me and almost everyone else had to restart their games to attempt to fix it. Only once were we able to all get in a code. However once we did and started playing, we all got separated from each other to different spawns and we could barely hear each other cause of voice mods the game had. So, we got off after trying to complete the second level. But we agreed to give the game another chance if it got fixed! Please try and fix it, the game looks great and the monsters are good at scaring you, but these bugs take most of the experience.

Thank you! -SG01

Sorry, but this game is trash, bro. Can’t even join the discord server using the joint server button and it won’t even let me into servers because somehow the servers are always full even at night even at school times they’re always full so so this game is basically trash to me. I tried to play with my friends many times but it just doesn’t work. It just won’t work. The only thing we can do is go in the shop and that’s it. We can’t even play the full game

This game is SO GOOD!! First the staff team is chill! I played with Oaktree ( Beta tester ) second the visuals are amazing I haven’t seen a game with such good visuals!!! Third it’s really scary also I recommend this game to play with friends because it’s really funny to do so. Anyways Amazing game and bye!

The game is really frustrating. Whenever I joined and I tried to play with my friends it wouldn’t let me join a private or random server and the keyboard wouldn’t work at all except for the arrows. And when I managed to join a game it had bugs in it. Fix the bugs and the keyboard system. It was hard to play the game because I couldn’t.

I have played basically every vr backrooms game under the sun and this game by FAR takes the cake. Other than server issues, when you get into a game, it is stunning. The levels are fun, well modelled and genuinely enjoyable. If you’re thinking about getting a vr backrooms game other than this, like Facility Apes 3, Wonder, Paranoia, Noclip etc. I would advise you that even paid games on vr can not match the quality of this game. If they fix the servers this game is top tier. Great time on this game!

Now I've seen a lot of discourse in the reviews segment of the game's page. People give it 5 stars, saying it's the best free Backrooms VR game. Others say it's the worst game ever because they can't join a lobby, or things aren't working properly. I'll give my honest opinion. This game is mediocre at best. Not terrible, but not great either.

This game (like many others) is yet another Gorilla Tag movement copy and paste. In no way is this game well made or original. Just another Gorilla Tag fan game. The game is also quite janky from my experience. It very much lacks any true horror elements, this game is not very scary at all. And I have no positive things to say about the game.

From what I've seen, people in the reviews of these types of games have a thing for giving Gtag slop (as I like to call it) undeserved praise. In one review I saw the user claimed that this was the best game ever and that it was super realistic. How? What is realistic or fun about this game, seriously?

 I think the only reason that this game's Reviews are so split between being terrible and amazing is because the player base is mostly children. Children are impressionable - easy to manipulate. These children have essentially been brainwashed by the Gorilla Tag craze. People see this and realize that if they slap Gorilla Tag onto anything, they'll make a profit. Young children also have stronger emotions, if they like something, they love it. If they dislike something, they hate it. If their opinions lean slightly more to one more than the other, it will go straight to the most extreme.

My advice: don't install this game, it's a waste of perfectly good storage on your headset.

Ok so there is a reason why you can't join any servers for some reason. In the last most recent reviews I seen people are review bombing the game because from what I've seen this game is good. It's on YouTube. There's stuff you can watch of it. It has good graphics and there's some other stuff for it. The reason why I gave it a one star review is because of a very large system error. Every single server that this indie game making whatever has is broken. There is something wrong and it does an error Loop that makes it so nobody can join any of the servers saying that they are false and that they're just full. It says every single, private and public server is full when in reality none of them are it really really sucks that they've done this and I don't know why they aren't trying to fix this faster but for some reason they haven't put out a patch to fix their game yet. So really all these review bombing that you guys are doing. Tell them that their servers are broken and do something about it. It's not your Internet It's not your metaquest it's their servers. Tell them to fix their game And I would like to clarify this is a good game. I just don't recommend playing it now. Play it when an update comes out because they'll most likely have fixed the servers. If they're just updating the game to add more stuff right now and are not trying to fix the servers that is a really dumb move cuz they're going to lose any and all players they have left. Well they don't have any players left because nobody can play the game. Fix your game one star

I was playing this game with my friend but we couldn't join private codes so we just played by ourselves but you can still play in public just press quick connect then wait for people its worth the wait this game is so fun and I met a guy and a made a new friend and it was so fun playing with him and the levels are scary but some are easy but some are hard we were playing for a long time then my vr was about to die but we got down so many levels then my vr was at 4% then we died but before I could add him my vr died and a was really sad but this game is so fun and a good multi-player game its fun, and scary experience I recommend this to anyone who's finding a good horror game and this game gets 5 stars.

So I saw this game in a TikTok video, installed it and tried it, and I was very surprised by the good lighting and atmosphere. The entities scared me a lot, and their models were very good I loved the levels,yall could add more But it's okay.I see a lot of potential in this game if it continues to be updated, Applause to the creator(s)

reviews.review_title: If ur gonna make a game make it playable
reviews.review_description: First what do you mean servers are full then make a new one also I can’t make a private server the buttons don’t work and when I finally got put in a server I was trapped in the elevator I can’t join the discord and so now I know why this game is 2.7 stars

1. The note in level 2 almost never appears 
2. Load save doesn’t work 
3. Sometimes if you die you fall out of the map 
4. Items fall through the floor 
5. There’s a lot of lag even on the lowest settings


I would not recommend this game currently

I just installed the game with very high hopes for the game but the servers are ether glitched or broken. Not even private servers work. The only part of the game that works is the shop, and I cant even get the cosmetics to work. I cant even do anything without being in a server. If the game is fix I'll definitely come back to this game!

This game was booty to the point it wouldn’t even let me join a private server  with my friend and it teleported me to a random place and it made me so mad to the point I have to leave this review it was actually buns and I can see why this game has so many bad reviews and the keyboard doesn’t even work like how hard is it to make a good keyboard that works also the entire budget went into the keyboard moving when you type on it

This game is great and the levels are very fun,monsters are scary, and the items are cool but people are leaving 1 star reviews cause they can’t join a server even though it’s usually a glitch when it is just restart your game but also it could be true because the dev is a solo dev and can afford only so many servers.
